activities.title: Rare-Earth-Free Synchronous Motor Drives
activities.notes: Open-ended TDF proposal. Project Eklavya. Applications: drone propulsion (fractional kW, 12V, TRL ~7), ATV traction (20-50 kW, 48-400V). Budget exceeds INR 50 Cr; 90% grant-in-aid.
